title: Vanilla Extended
description: A Modpack that extends the vanilla experience, but does not alter it too much. Many things can be changed via config
body:
Expand Your Adventure, Keep the Vanilla Soul

Vanilla Extended enhances your Minecraft experience while staying true to the original feel of the game. This modpack adds depth, variety, and creativity without overwhelming players with overly complex mechanics.



🌿 Features

New Biomes & Structures – Discover beautiful and diverse landscapes with Biomes O’ Plenty and Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone. Explore new dungeons, ruins, points of interest and new mobs and bossesin both the Overworld and Nether.

End Dimension Overhaul – The End is no longer empty. Explore a reimagined dimension filled with new terrain, structures, and challenges.

Building Expansion – Unleash your creativity with a massive selection of new building blocks and decorative options from mods like Chisel and more.

Furniture & Decorations – Bring your builds to life with new furniture pieces and detailed decorations.

Adventure & Combat Upgrades – Face new creatures and enhance your gear with weapon upgrades and new tools.

Farming & Lifestyle – Enrich your survival world with Farmer’s Delight and similar mods that add new crops, food, and crafting options.



🛡️ Vanilla Extended?

This pack is perfect for players who love the original Minecraft experience but want more exploration, creativity, and variety without sacrificing the game’s classic feel. You want a Forever Vanilla Plus World? This is your modpack!
